zh.Brewood, Staffordshire, Kingdom of Engla: 英國英格蘭斯塔福爾布霍德
zh.Southampton, Hampshire, England: 英國英格蘭哈普爾素坦普頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當Joane Moreton於1556年出生在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾布霍德時，她的父親Roger Bradshaw Fowke, 5th Lord Brewood31歲，母親Margaret Mary Moreton of Haughton-Fowke26歲。她於1570年4月11日與Roger Fowkes在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾布霍德結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1590年10月18日在她的家鄉享年34歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾布霍德。

zh-hans.Brewood, Staffordshire, Kingdom of Engla: 英国英格兰斯塔福爾布霍德
zh-hans.Southampton, Hampshire, England: 英国英格兰哈普爾素坦普頓
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joane Moreton于1556年出生在英国英格兰斯塔福爾布霍德时，她的父亲Roger Bradshaw Fowke, 5th Lord Brewood31岁，母亲Margaret Mary Moreton of Haughton-Fowke26岁。她于1570年4月11日与Roger Fowkes在英国英格兰斯塔福爾布霍德结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1590年10月18日在她的家乡享年34岁，埋葬在英国英格兰斯塔福爾布霍德。

nameMeanings.name: Moreton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French: nickname from a double diminutive of   More   2 ‘Moor’. Compare   Moret  .

variants.name: Morton
meanings: English and Scottish: habitational name from any of the many places called Mor(e)ton, named with Old English mōr ‘moor’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’. There has probably been some confusion with Morten , and perhaps also with Murton . This English name has also been established in Ireland since the 13th century.
American shortened and altered form of Swedish Mårtensson or Mortensson (see Martenson and Mortenson ), which could also be substituted for the Finnish cognate Marttinen.

nameMeanings.name: Joane
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Old French Jo(h)anne, and so a doublet of Joan . This too was revived as a given name in its own right in the first half of the 20th century. It has to some extent been influenced by the independently formed combination Jo Anne.

variants.name: Johanne
meanings: and Norwegian feminine form of   Johan .

variants.name: Joann
meanings: From Old French Jo(h)anne, and so a doublet of Joan . This too was revived as a given name in its own right in the first half of the 20th century. It has to some extent been influenced by the independently formed combination Jo Anne.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

en.lifeSummary: When Joane Moreton was born in 1556, in Brewood, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Roger Bradshaw Fowke, 5th Lord Brewood, was 31 and her mother, Margaret Mary Moreton of Haughton-Fowke, was 26. She married Roger Fowkes on 11 April 1570, in Brewood, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 5 daughters. She died on 18 October 1590, in her hometown, at the age of 34, and was buried in Brewood, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joane Moreton est née en 1556, à Brewood, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Roger Bradshaw Fowke, 5th Lord Brewood, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Margaret Mary Moreton of Haughton-Fowke, avait 26 ans. Elle a épousé Roger Fowkes le 11 avril 1570, à Brewood, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée le 18 octobre 1590, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 34 ans, et a été enterrée à Brewood, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Joane Moreton 1556 in Brewood, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Roger Bradshaw Fowke, 5th Lord Brewood 31 und ihre Mutter Margaret Mary Moreton of Haughton-Fowke 26. Sie hat am 11. April 1570 in Brewood, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom Roger Fowkes geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb am 18. Oktober 1590 im Alter von 34 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in Brewood, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Joane Moreton è nata il nel 1556 nel Brewood, Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Roger Bradshaw Fowke, 5th Lord Brewood, aveva 31 anni e sua madre, Margaret Mary Moreton of Haughton-Fowke, aveva 26 anni. Lei sposato Roger Fowkes il 11 aprile 1570, nel Brewood, Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 5 figlie. Morì il 18 ottobre 1590, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 34 anni, e fu sepolta a Brewood, Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Joane Moretonが1556年にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアブレウッドで生まれた時，父Roger Bradshaw Fowke, 5th Lord Brewoodは31歳，母Margaret Mary Moreton of Haughton-Fowkeは26歳であった。1570年4月11日にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアブレウッドでRoger Fowkesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1590年10月18日に故郷で34歳で死去し，イギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアブレウッドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Joane Moreton(이)가 1556년 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 브레우드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Roger Bradshaw Fowke, 5th Lord Brewood(은)는 31세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Mary Moreton of Haughton-Fowke(은)는 26세였다. 그녀는 1570년 4월 11일 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 브레우드에서 Roger Fowkes(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1590년 10월 18일 그녀의 고향에서 34세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 브레우드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joane Moreton nasceu em 1556, em Brewood, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Roger Bradshaw Fowke, 5th Lord Brewood, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Mary Moreton of Haughton-Fowke, tinha 26 anos. Ela casou-se com Roger Fowkes em 11 de abril de 1570, em Brewood, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 5 filhas. Ela faleceu em 18 de outubro de 1590, em sua cidade natal, com 34 anos, e foi sepultada em Brewood, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joane Moreton родилась в 1556 г. в местности брюуд, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Roger Bradshaw Fowke, 5th Lord Brewood было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Margaret Mary Moreton of Haughton-Fowke, 26. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Roger Fowkes 11 апреля 1570 г. в местности брюуд, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 5 дочерей. Она умерла 18 октября 1590 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 34 лет и была похоронена в местности брюуд, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Joane Moreton nació en 1556, en Brewood, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Roger Bradshaw Fowke, 5th Lord Brewood, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Margaret Mary Moreton of Haughton-Fowke, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Roger Fowkes el 11 de abril de 1570, en Brewood, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió el 18 de octubre de 1590, en su pueblo, a la edad de 34 años, y fue sepultada en Brewood, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
